patch.value: As a maintainer reviewing an audit trail, I want field-level history diffs, so that I can see exactly when/who changed a field without comparing snapshots
As a maintainer reviewing an audit trail, I want field-level history diffs, so that I can see exactly when/who changed a field without comparing snapshots
pm history <id> --diff shows per-event {field,before,after}; --field filters to one field; includes author+timestamp; json+text

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: history-diff.ts core module delivered for --field filter feature. computeHistoryDiff() accepts optional { field?: string } — when supplied, skips entries that don't touch that field and restricts each emitted entry's changes/changed_fields to the single matching field. This directly powers 'pm history <id> --diff --field status' (show only entries where status changed, with before/after values). patchPathToChangedField() exported from new module; orchestrator can replace the private copy in history.ts with this import. 40 tests pass in tests/unit/core/history/history-diff.spec.ts.

patch.value: Add pm history --diff --field: filter the audit diff to one field's transitions

Shipped --field <name> (implies --diff): emits only entries that changed the named field, with before/after values, answering 'when/who changed <field>'. CLI-discoverable via FLAG_CONTRACTS + completion + help.

Shipped pm history --diff --field <name> (implies --diff): filters the value diff to one field's transitions with before/after + author + ts. Exposed CLI-only (FLAG_CONTRACTS + completion + help) to avoid colliding with create/update's repeatable --field array param; MCP returns the full changes[] for client-side filtering. Covered by command tests + manual e2e.
